description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme in green, tan, and black. The aircraft features sharply swept-back wings with twin vertical stabilizers at the tail, and two large jet engines mounted at the rear. The nose is pointed and painted gray, with a forward-positioned, enclosed cockpit that has a dark canopy. The landing gear is deployed, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible. Distinctive markings, including numbers and insignia, are present on the fuselage and wings, indicating military affiliation.
description: A camouflaged military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. Features include rear-mounted twin jet engines and visible landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, camouflage pattern, and landing gear; the left wing and tail fin are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin jet engines, twin vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan with camouflage pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the right wing, cockpit, and landing gear, with the black upper fuselage and tail details prominent.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the wings and vertical stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept-back wings with moderate anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers at the rear.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units, retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely multi-seat.
